stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
While on approach, the pilot observes the depicted lights. What does this indicate regarding the glideslope?

The aircraft is…

options.a: (1) above the approach slope; (2) on or close to the approach slope.
options.b: (1) on or close to the approach slope; (2) above the approach slope.
options.c: (1) below the approach slope; (2) on or close to the approach slope.
options.d: (1) above the approach slope; (2) below the approach slope.
